business_object: Six supplier quote/clarification requests for organic turmeric powder export RFQ
external_party: Spice Valley Exports; Amar Foodz; Ratnaraj Foods Private Limited; Navnath Spices Private Limited; Darideep Agro Foods Private Limited; Globus Global Trade Import And Export
expected_benefit: Obtain the missing second quote proof and clarify whether the offered item is plain turmeric powder or curcumin extract before pricing.
concrete_risk: Supplier outreach creates external commercial contact and could disclose demand context; product/spec ambiguity may cause wrong classification or misleading organic/curcumin claims if not clarified.
recovery_path: If approved in error, do not send follow-ups; mark APR-003 superseded/rejected, preserve draft files, and require revised supplier list before any contact.
missing_information: At least one additional quote proof is still missing.
Supplier clarification is required for the 95% curcumin wording in Q-002.
Final HSN/ITC-HS and export policy require human/export-expert approval.
Buyer RFQ attachment and buyer import/food registration proof are not in local evidence.
